mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM users) AS totalUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM users WHERE status IS NULL OR status = 0) AS activeUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM users WHERE status = 1) AS frozenUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM users WHERE status = 2) AS cancelledUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM users WHERE role = 0) AS adminUsers, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM movies) AS totalMovies, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM persons) AS totalPeople, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM genres) AS totalGenres, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM regions) AS totalRegions, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM comments) AS totalComments, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM comments WHERE status = 2) AS publishedCommentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM comments WHERE status = 1) AS draftCommentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM comments WHERE status = 2 AND type = 1) AS shortCommentCount, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM comments WHERE status = 2 AND type = 2) AS longReviewCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(votes), 0)::int FROM comments WHERE status = 2) AS totalCommentLikes, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM ratings) AS totalRatings, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM favorites) AS totalFavorites, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM view_history) AS totalViewHistories, (SELECT COUNT(*)::int FROM watched_movies) AS totalWatchedMovies

WITH dates AS ( SELECT generate_series(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 day', CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS trend_date ) SELECT TO_CHAR(d.trend_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, COALESCE(COUNT(u.user_id), 0)::int AS value FROM dates d LEFT JOIN users u ON u.create_time >= d.trend_date AND u.create_time < d.trend_date + INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY d.trend_date ORDER BY d.trend_date

WITH dates AS ( SELECT generate_series(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 day', CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS trend_date ) SELECT TO_CHAR(d.trend_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, COALESCE(COUNT(c.comment_id), 0)::int AS value FROM dates d LEFT JOIN comments c ON c.status = 2 AND c.comment_time >= d.trend_date AND c.comment_time < d.trend_date + INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY d.trend_date ORDER BY d.trend_date

WITH dates AS ( SELECT generate_series(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 day', CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS trend_date ) SELECT TO_CHAR(d.trend_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, COALESCE(COUNT(f.user_id), 0)::int AS value FROM dates d LEFT JOIN favorites f ON f.create_time >= d.trend_date AND f.create_time < d.trend_date + INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY d.trend_date ORDER BY d.trend_date

WITH dates AS ( SELECT generate_series(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 day', CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS trend_date ) SELECT TO_CHAR(d.trend_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, COALESCE(COUNT(r.user_id), 0)::int AS value FROM dates d LEFT JOIN ratings r ON r.rating_time >= d.trend_date AND r.rating_time < d.trend_date + INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY d.trend_date ORDER BY d.trend_date

WITH dates AS ( SELECT generate_series(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 day', CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS trend_date ) SELECT TO_CHAR(d.trend_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, COALESCE(COUNT(v.history_id), 0)::int AS value FROM dates d LEFT JOIN view_history v ON v.view_time >= d.trend_date AND v.view_time < d.trend_date + INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY d.trend_date ORDER BY d.trend_date

WITH dates AS ( SELECT generate_series(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 day', CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL '1 day')::date AS trend_date ) SELECT TO_CHAR(d.trend_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS date, COALESCE(COUNT(w.user_id), 0)::int AS value FROM dates d LEFT JOIN watched_movies w ON w.create_time >= d.trend_date AND w.create_time < d.trend_date + INTERVAL '1 day' GROUP BY d.trend_date ORDER BY d.trend_date
